stemHtml: An aircraft experiencing radio communication failure on an IFR flight in IMC should fly at the same speed and level for the time indicated in ICAO ANNEX 2 and then…

options.a: proceed in accordance with the current flight plan to the designated navigation aid serving the destination aerodrome.
options.b: proceed in accordance with the current flight plan to the designated navigation aid serving the departure aerodrome.
options.c: proceed in accordance with the current flight plan to the designated navigation aid serving an alternate aerodrome.
options.d: divert to the most suitable aerodrome according to the route of flight.
